title: funcy's Tell Coords
description: A simple fabric mod that allows you to send your coordinates in chat easily!
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1155e11342e517984417ed933045d179fd2bd400_0.webp)

A fabric mod that easily allows you to send your coordinates in chat! (100% customizable)
